---
name: Feature request
about: Something we should add or change
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What's broken or missing in the current workflow? Be specific — "transcripts are slow" beats "performance is bad".

## Proposal

What should TMA do instead?

## Alternatives considered

What did you try first that didn't work?

## Scope

- [ ] Affects v1 (TMA only) — discuss in this issue
- [ ] Affects v1.1+ (TGC / TCal / new adapter) — flag for roadmap discussion in TTI 立项书 thread
- [ ] Schema change to INTERFACES.md required

## Anything else

Mockups, related discussions, prior art in other tools.
